title: Prepare wool based on its characteristics for classing
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Prepare wool based on its characteristics for classing demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Check fleece for impurities and relate to processor requirements

pcs.text: Identify characteristics of wool important in processing, and assess uniformity within the fleece
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify characteristics of wool important in processing, and assess uniformity within the fleece?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify characteristics of wool important in processing, and assess uniformity within the fleece.

pcs.text: Identify natural impurities, vegetable matter (VM) types, mineral impurities and contamination of the wool and determine the portion of fleece to be removed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify natural impurities, vegetable matter (VM) types, mineral impurities and contamination of the wool and determine the portion of fleece to be removed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify natural impurities, vegetable matter (VM) types, mineral impurities and contamination of the wool and determine the portion of fleece to be removed.

pcs.text: Identify hairy breeches and cotted wool and determine the portion of fleece to be removed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hairy breeches and cotted wool and determine the portion of fleece to be removed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hairy breeches and cotted wool and determine the portion of fleece to be removed.

pcs.text: Identify unscourable colour, water colour and dermatitis and handle as directed by the Wool Classer
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify unscourable colour, water colour and dermatitis and handle as directed by the Wool Classer?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify unscourable colour, water colour and dermatitis and handle as directed by the Wool Classer.

pcs.text: Check work regularly with the Wool Classer and adjust procedures if required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check work regularly with the Wool Classer and adjust procedures if required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check work regularly with the Wool Classer and adjust procedures if required.

pcs.text: Comply with WHS and biosecurity standards according to workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Comply with WHS and biosecurity standards according to workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Comply with WHS and biosecurity standards according to workplace requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Check fleece for impurities and relate to processor requirements

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and separate wool based on the level and type of vegetable matter contamination where it requires different processing.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify mobs with high pigmented fibre risk and keep their wool completely separate from low-risk wool.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify wool from sheep with shedding characteristics and keep completely separate from non-shedding white woolled sheep.
